name: Restraint of Trade During Employment
text: The Employee acknowledges that during the term of employment, they shall not directly or indirectly engage in any activity that constitutes a restraint of trade against the Employer. Any post-termination restrictions shall be reasonable in scope, geographic extent, and duration so as to be enforceable under applicable Indian law.

legal_basis.note: During-employment restraint valid — Niranjan Shankar Golikari v Century Spinning (SC 1967)
Damages for breach of during-employment restraint

invalid_if: Clause restricts lawful profession beyond employment term
source: Indian Contract Act, 1872 S.27; Niranjan Shankar Golikari (SC 1967)
title: Restraint of Trade
dispute_hotspots: During-employment restraint enforceable by injunction — garden leave makes this commercially viable
Post-employment element smuggled in — courts blue-pencil to limit to employment term
